title: Mellow Australian Christmas Pudding Bake
description: A briny and pillowy one-pot Australian dish featuring Christmas pudding, perfect for the holiday season, with a high-protein twist.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs, yogurt, and lemon juice.
Add the crumbled Christmas pudding, cooked shrimp, feta cheese, and chopped spinach to the bowl and stir until well combined.
Pour the mixture into a 9x13 inch baking dish and smooth the top.
Cover the dish with aluminum foil and bake for 25 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10 minutes, or until the top is lightly golden brown.
Remove the dish from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
Serve warm, garnished with additional chopped spinach and lemon wedges if desired.
